gt_memories: 【Other Learning Attributes】 Project 1: Comprehensive Outdoor Living Area Renovation – Burleigh Heads. Project Type: Residential Renovation & Extension – Outdoor Living Area Development. Project Overview: This project involved a complete transformation of an existing outdoor space for a private residential client in Burleigh Heads. The scope encompassed the demolition of an outdated concrete patio, extensive site preparation, and the construction of a new, expansive timber deck with an integrated pergola, alongside the installation of a storage shed and associated landscaping works. Key Tasks & Scope of Work: Demolition & Site Preparation (safe and efficient demolition and removal of existing concrete patio structure, excavation and preparation of footings for new timber deck and pergola); Structural Construction (construction of a substantial timber deck, approximately 40 square metres, erection of a new timber pergola, installation of a pre-fabricated storage shed); Landscaping (execution of minor landscaping works around the newly constructed elements). Challenges & Solutions: Material Logistics (restricted access by a narrow side path, necessitating manual handling of materials, managed through careful planning and efficient team coordination); Ground Conditions (encountered unexpectedly hard ground and rock during footing excavation, overcome by promptly sourcing and utilising specialised rock-breaking equipment). Outcome: The project was completed to the client's full satisfaction, delivering a significantly enhanced and highly functional outdoor living area.
